economic_notes: Consolidated entities include Upper Similkameen Development Corporation, 0628957 BC Ltd., K'tipx Logging Ltd., K'tipx Logging Limited Partnership, Chuchuwayha Forestry Ltd., Chuchuwayha Forestry Limited Partnership. GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Stuwix Resources JV (12.5% interest) and Vermilion Forks Community Forest Corporation (33.3% interest). Logging and natural resources are significant revenue streams.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Six entities fully consolidated including logging and forestry subsidiaries. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Long-term debt includes both long-term debt ($1,023,325) and capital lease obligations ($1,199,684) totaling $2,223,009. Current liabilities include bank indebtedness ($95,000) and accounts payable ($342,973). Annual debt service calculated as repayment of long-term debt ($840,078) plus repayment of capital lease obligations ($328,301) = $1,168,379. Total government transfers include ISC ($2,023,859) + Province of BC ($3,507,095) + FNHA ($677,041) + CMHC ($24,499) + BC FN Gaming ($314,517) - note gaming revenue sharing may be considered OSR; total_government_transfers calculated as ISC + Province of BC + FNHA + CMHC = $6,232,494 less gaming and interest. OSR approximated from segment data economic activities and other ($5,895,628). No remuneration schedule included in the financial statements provided. Amortization schedule shows minor rounding difference (755,330 vs 755,331).
